things.name: Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque
things.description: The most beautiful mosque in Southeast Asia - white marble dome reflected in a lagoon

things.name: Kampong Ayer (Water Village)
things.description: World's largest water village - 39,000 people live on stilts over the river

things.name: Jame'Asr Hassanil Bolkiah Mosque
things.description: Brunei's largest mosque with 29 golden domes - one for each Sultan in the dynasty

things.name: Royal Regalia Museum
things.description: Museum of the Sultan's coronation regalia with a gilded ceremonial chariot

things.name: Ulu Temburong National Park
things.description: Pristine primary rainforest - the green jewel of Brunei - reached only by longboat

things.name: Istana Nurul Iman (Sultan's Palace)
things.description: World's largest residential palace with 1,788 rooms - visible from the river

things.name: Brunei Museum
things.description: Natural history, Islamic art and Brunei's oil industry heritage

things.name: Tasek Merimbun Heritage Park
things.description: Brunei's largest freshwater lake in a ASEAN Heritage Park with proboscis monkeys

things.name: Jerudong Park Playground
things.description: Vast free amusement park once used by the Sultan for private entertainment

things.name: Ambuyat (Sago Paste)
things.description: Brunei's national dish - glutinous sago paste twirled on a bamboo fork and dipped in sauces
